zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Lancaster於1362年出生在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德韋斯特 沃德。她於從1384年1月9日到1385年1月8日與William Featherstonhaugh在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1414年在她的家鄉享年52歲。

nameMeanings.name: Lancaster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lancaster in northwestern England, which is recorded as Loncastre in 1086. The place takes its name from the river Lune + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’). The river name is probably British, perhaps related to Gaelic slán ‘healthy’, ‘salubrious’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Lancaster was born in 1362, in West Ward, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. She married William Featherstonhaugh from 9 January 1384 to 8 January 1385, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1414, in her hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Lancaster est née en 1362, à West Ward, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé William Featherstonhaugh du 9 janvier 1384 au 8 janvier 1385, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1414, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Lancasterは1362年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドウエスト ワードで生まれた。から1384年1月9日まで1385年1月8日にイギリスイギリスでWilliam Featherstonhaughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1414年に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Lancaster(은)는 1362년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 웨스트 워드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1384년 1월 9일부터 1385년 1월 8일까지 영국 잉글랜드에서 William Featherstonhaugh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1414년 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Lancaster родилась в 1362 г. в местности вест вард, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Featherstonhaugh с 9 января 1384 по 8 января 1385 в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1414 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.
